listings.title: Rogers Cleveland Drums 12 14 20 Blue Sparkling Pearl Outfit
listings.body: All Cleveland drums built in Covington.  Holiday 8x12 and 14x14 toms and Cleveland Tower 14x20 bass.  Those three drums are for 1800 firm.  The optional snare and toms were all born together in the early 60s, had B and B lugs which were replaced by the previous owner. They have a nice tight original beautiful sparkling blue wrap and original edges.  Toms have tall boy hoops, rounded edges and sound absolutely incredible.  I was told it they are Jasper shells. The bass includes the rare extended cymbal arm w extension with tilter and tom arm (worth 200+ alone).  I am briefly listing the two toms and bass drum for 1800 cash in person only.  If you want the snare it is available for an additional 500 cash in person. Pick up 1.2 hours north of NYC by car or take the Metro North Harlem Line out of Grand Central in Manhattan and approximately 30 min. from CT or NJ for purchase. This listing will be only available until Saturday May 30th because I have other offers pending.  I’m selling three bop sized drum sets w 18” bass drums (DW, Rogers and Craviotto) as well and many snare drums so feel free to share what you are looking for, I may have it.

listings.title: Breville juicer
listings.body: Breville “Juice Fountain” is the Cadillac of juicers. It’s slightly used but in good working condition. I’m selling only because I went to smoothies instead of juicing. Pickup in White Plains, cash or Zelle only.

listings.title: Oreck XL Commercial Upright Vacuum Cleaner
listings.body: Powerful vacuum with 50 foot cord, excellent condition, comes with extra bags and owner's manual. Reply with phone number if interested and I will call or text you.  Available for pick up in Ardsley.
